title: Caramelized Tomato British Salad
description: This savory and crowd-pleasing salad features vine tomatoes caramelized in a tangy dressing for a sweet and sour flavor profile that's both comforting and refreshing.
instructions: Slice the tomatoes into wedges and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle olive oil over the tomatoes, sprinkle with salt and gently toss until evenly coated.
Roast in the preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes or until the edges are slightly charred and caramelized. Remove from heat and set aside to cool slightly.
In a small bowl, mix together white wine vinegar and balsamic glaze; stir gently with a whisk to dissolve any lumps.
When tomatoes have cooled enough, slice them in half lengthwise using kitchen shears or a sharp knife. Add the caramelized tomato wedges back onto the baking sheet.
To assemble: place slices of soaked cashews and thyme leaves on top of the tomatoes, drizzle with the dressing mixture, and gently toss to combine evenly.
Serve immediately or chill in the refrigerator for up to 1 hour before serving. The flavors will meld better as they rest.
Optional garnish with additional thyme leaves if desired.
